# Curved boundary edges: a square with one curved side at various curvatures.
# Verifies stalls are generated reliably along curved boundary faces.

# --- Gentle curve (small outward bulge on edge 1: right side) ---

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

# Edge 1 goes from (300,0) to (300,200). Bulge outward (rightward) gently.
curve outer 1 330,60 330,140
----
curve outer edge 1

generate
----
total_stalls: 80

screenshot curved-boundary-gentle.png
----

# --- Moderate curve ---

clear
----
cleared

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

# Bigger outward bulge.
curve outer 1 370,50 370,150
----
curve outer edge 1

generate
----
total_stalls: 104

screenshot curved-boundary-moderate.png
----

# --- Strong curve ---

clear
----
cleared

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

# Large outward bulge — creates a wide belly.
curve outer 1 420,40 420,160
----
curve outer edge 1

generate
----
total_stalls: 95

screenshot curved-boundary-strong.png
----

# --- Inward curve (concave) ---

clear
----
cleared

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

# Inward curve — boundary bows inward on the right side.
curve outer 1 260,60 260,140
----
curve outer edge 1

generate
----
total_stalls: 80

screenshot curved-boundary-inward.png
----

# --- Two curved sides ---

clear
----
cleared

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

# Right side curves outward, top side curves upward.
curve outer 1 350,60 350,140
----
curve outer edge 1

curve outer 2 240,240 60,240
----
curve outer edge 2

generate
----
total_stalls: 87

screenshot curved-boundary-two-sides.png
----
